userStories.title: Inventory: list every worker and its real expected cadence
acceptanceCriteria: Query sync_log for all distinct worker names ever seen
Query /status for all workers currently registered
Cross-reference with all cron entries: /etc/cron.d/, crontab -l for all users, docker-compose cron services
For each worker produce: name | trigger_type | real_cadence | current_threshold | match
Write full inventory to docs/worker-cadence-inventory.md
Flag every worker where match=NO
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/worker-cadence-inventory.md && grep -c 'NO' docs/worker-cadence-inventory.md; echo 'Above is count of mismatches - document all, fix in W-02'

userStories.title: Declare explicit expected_cadence_hours for every worker in config
acceptanceCriteria: Locate where worker stale thresholds are defined
For each worker flagged match=NO in W-01: update its threshold to match real cadence
Add a comment per worker with real schedule
No worker should use a generic default threshold if its real schedule is known
After fix: /status stale_workers_count must be 0
Prometheus WorkerSilent alert rule must reference per-worker thresholds via exported status
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '.stale_workers_count' | grep '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-STALE-WORKERS-NONZERO

userStories.title: Write automated cadence test - catches misconfiguration at deploy time
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/api/tests/test_worker_cadence.py
Every worker in cadence config has explicit expected_cadence_hours > 0
expected_cadence_hours matches cron schedule in infra/
stale threshold is >= expected_cadence_hours * 1.5
No worker uses 0 or None cadence
Test fails if cadence config is missing any active worker
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_worker_cadence.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add new worker registration gate - new workers must declare cadence or fail deploy
acceptanceCriteria: In worker bootstrap or /status handler, unknown worker cadence logs a warning
CI cadence test must pass before deploy
scripts/weekly-accuracy-check.sh verifies no worker is missing cadence declaration
New workers added without cadence declaration fail loudly
userStories.verificationCommand: bash scripts/weekly-accuracy-check.sh 2>&1 | grep -i 'cadence\|stale\|worker' | tail -10 && echo PASS

userStories.title: Verify Alertmanager silence rules are clean after threshold corrections
acceptanceCriteria: Check Alertmanager for active silences
Delete any silence created as a workaround for threshold mismatch after W-02
After cleanup: 0 active silences unless documented
Document retained silences in docs/alertmanager-silences.md
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:9093/api/v2/silences | jq '[.[] | select(.status.state=="active")] | length' | grep '^0$' && echo PASS || echo 'FAIL or document retained silences'

userStories.title: Final verification - 0 false positives across full weekly cycle simulation
acceptanceCriteria: Simulate all workers running on declared schedule
Run mcp_validation_suite.py and require ok=true
Check Alertmanager: 0 FIRING, 0 active silences unless documented
/status: stale_workers_count=0
Run test_worker_cadence.py
Write final summary to progress.txt
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '{stale_workers_count, api, db}' | grep -q '"stale_workers_count": 0' && pytest apps/api/tests/test_worker_cadence.py -q 2>&1 | grep -E 'passed' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
